description: Snapshot of user-scope Claude Code plugins and marketplaces. Consumed by scripts/install-plugins.sh.

marketplaces.name: superpowers-marketplace
marketplaces.note: Aggregator. claude-plugins-official already ships superpowers — this marketplace is optional.

marketplaces.name: vercel-vercel-plugin
marketplaces.note: Original install was from a local directory (~/.cache/plugins/github.com-vercel-vercel-plugin). Reference the github repo here for portability.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core Anthropic-curated skillset: brainstorming, TDD, verification, plan execution, subagent dispatch, debugging, worktrees, code review.

plugins.name: vercel-plugin
plugins.description: Vercel platform toolkit: deploy, env vars, preview URLs, runtime logs, Next.js / AI SDK / Turborepo guidance, MCP Vercel tools.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Live documentation lookup for libraries/frameworks (React, Next.js, Prisma, etc.). MCP-powered.

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: Simplify/refine recently modified code while preserving functionality.

plugins.name: claude-mem
plugins.description: Persistent cross-session memory database with search/timeline/observations.
